---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new detection category, language support, or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the detection gap or use case.

## Proposed solution

How you think it should work. If suggesting a new integration category, include:
- Category name and CWE mapping
- Example code patterns to detect
- Suggested severity level

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered.
